Illinois Criminal Justice Information Authority (ICJIA)
Annual Statistical Report — Fiscal Year 2024

This document summarizes agency appropriations, grant program outcomes, and department policy
initiatives for the state fiscal year. The authority coordinates information sharing across agencies.

Section 1. Appropriations and budget
The legislature authorized appropriations for community programs. Department staff reviewed
each grant application against published policy criteria.

Section 2. Program outcomes
Agency partners reported measurable improvements in fiscal accountability during the fiscal year.
